# Agentic CI/CD Copilot — Recommended Fix

Update pytest invocation in CI to use a writable log file path.

## Commands to Apply

```bash
sed -i 's|--log-file=/var/log/pytest.log|--log-file=pytest.log|g' .github/workflows/*.yml
```

*Generated by [Agentic CI/CD Copilot](https://github.com/Atharv5873/Agentic-CI-CD-Copilot)*
